name: Pasta Rings in Spicy Cucumber Raita
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Minced yellow or white onion
2 tablespoons Finely minced fresh mint or Parsley
1 lb Anellini or other small Pasta rings
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine grated cucumber and onion in a small bowl. Sprinkle with salt and let stand for 10 minutes.
2. Drain the mixture and squeeze out any excess moisture.
3. Whisk yogurt until creamy smooth. Add the drained cucumber mixture, garlic, green onions, tomato, lemon juice, minced mint or parsley, cumin, and salt and pepper to taste.
4. Cook pasta in 4 quarts boiling water until very al dente. Drain and rinse well in cold water, then drain again. Place in a large bowl and cool to room temperature, stirring occasionally to prevent the pasta from sticking together.
5. Combine the cooled pasta with the yogurt mixture. Garnish with mint or parsley sprigs and cucumber slices.
